query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.orderType, o.outletId, o.pickupOutlet, o.instoreOutlet, o.createdAt 
FROM orders o 
WHERE o.orderNumber = '00133' OR o.id = 133
ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 5;
